description: Develop and fine-tune AI models tailored to the specific requirements of semiconductor inspection, emphasizing accuracy, reliability, and defect detection precision Design and implement intuitive user interfaces (UI), APIs, and microservices to facilitate seamless integration and efficient communication within AI-driven applications Conduct debugging, troubleshooting, and basic system optimizations to maintain software stability, performance, and responsiveness under production conditions Document technical processes and provide regular progress updates to ensure transparency and alignment with project goals Implement advanced techniques to enhance model accuracy, robustness, and generalization for semiconductor inspection Analyze AI results, interpret production data trends, and recommend actionable improvements to optimize defect detection and reduce false positives Build and maintain scalable machine learning operations or software automation pipelines to automate AI-related processes, ensuring consistency and efficiency Collaborate with cross-functional teams, to integrate AI solutions into semiconductor production workflows Evaluate emerging tools and methodologies, proposing enhancements to existing system based on industry best practices and performance metrics Execute additional tasks as assigned by supervisors, contributing to team objectives and operational needs Job Requirements Bachelor’s degree or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence or related field Proficiency in Python programming and foundational knowledge of AI and machine learning frameworks Understanding of AI modeling techniques, such as supervised and unsupervised learning, and familiarity with software development practices Strong problem-solving abilities with an aptitude for analyzing datasets and troubleshooting technical issues Proficiency in developing APIs, microservices, or scalable software solutions, with knowledge of machine learning operations is an advantage Proficiency in computer vision, data preprocessing, image analysis, or deep learning framework is an advantage Strong analytical mindset and ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment, with clear communication 1 to 2 years of relevant working experience is preferred. Fresh graduates with passion are welcome
